Bash(# Test login API returns userType field \(will fail auth but checks response structure\)
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"identifier":"test@test.com","password":"test","csrfToken":"fake"}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)" 2>/dev/null || curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"identifier":"test@test.com","password":"test","csrfToken":"fake"}' 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); highlights=[k for k in d if ''''/highlights/'''' in k]; print\(f''''Total mapped: {len\(d\)}''''\); print\(f''''Highlights: {len\(highlights\)}''''\); [print\(k\) for k in highlights]")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\(''./scripts/cloudinary-mapping.json''\); const keys=Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k=>k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''marojejy''\)\); console.log\(''Marojejy images:'', keys.length\); keys.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, ''->'', m[k]\)\)")
